task_completion.description: Update the existing 1949 item to the 'Book' item type
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero interface, the original item 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' is selected, and its 'Item Type' in the right-hand metadata pane is set to 'Book'.

task_completion.description: Create a Book Section for Warren Weaver's contribution
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new item exists in the library list. In the right-hand pane, its 'Item Type' is 'Book Section' and the 'Title' is exactly 'Recent Contributions to the Mathematical Theory of Communication'.

task_completion.description: Set the correct author and pages for Weaver's section
task_completion.visual_evidence: With Weaver's Book Section selected, the right-hand pane shows the author is only Warren Weaver (e.g., 'Weaver, Warren') and the 'Pages' field is set to '1-28'.

task_completion.description: Create a Book Section for Claude E. Shannon's contribution
task_completion.visual_evidence: Another new item exists in the library list. In the right-hand pane, its 'Item Type' is 'Book Section' and the 'Title' is exactly 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication'.

task_completion.description: Set the correct author and pages for Shannon's section
task_completion.visual_evidence: With Shannon's Book Section selected, the right-hand pane shows the author is only Claude E. Shannon (e.g., 'Shannon, Claude E.') and the 'Pages' field is set to '29-125'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Zotero graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Zotero application window being used to edit items, rather than a terminal window or database browser.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the correct Zotero fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The titles, authors, and pages are entered into their respective distinct fields in the Zotero right-hand info pane, not just pasted as a single block of text into a note or abstract field.

integrity.description: The agent created actual distinct items in the library
integrity.visual_evidence: The middle pane of the Zotero window shows multiple distinct rows for the parent book and the two new book sections.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The parent book is titled 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication'. Warren Weaver's section is titled 'Recent Contributions to the Mathematical Theory of Communication' (pages 1-28). Claude E. Shannon's section is titled 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' (pages 29-125). Verify these exact titles and page numbers in the Zotero item metadata fields. Note that Shannon's section shares the exact same title as the parent book, but must be a 'Book Section' item type.
